meta.description: West Bengal Assembly Election 2026 — 294 constituency results

seats.name: Dinhata
seats.note: Senior TMC minister Udayan Guha defeated

seats.name: Habra
seats.note: BJP wins over Jyoti Priya Mallick (TMC minister, food scam accused)

seats.name: Rajarhat New Town
seats.note: Narrowest margin in 2026 election — BJP wins by 316 votes

seats.name: Sandeshkhali (ST)
seats.note: TMC holds Sandeshkhali despite being focal point of BJP campaign

seats.name: Baruipur Paschim
seats.note: Assembly Speaker Biman Banerjee holds seat by 16,440

seats.name: Diamond Harbour
seats.note: TMC holds Abhishek Banerjee's former Lok Sabha stronghold

seats.name: Bhangar
seats.note: ISF (Indian Secular Front) wins — only third-party seat in South Bengal

seats.name: Behala Paschim
seats.note: Ex-minister Partha Chatterjee (SSC scam accused) wins by 4,201 despite arrest

seats.name: Bhabanipur
seats.note: CM Suvendu Adhikari wins from Mamata's old stronghold

seats.name: Singur
seats.note: TMC holds Singur — Becharam Manna wins the seat he made famous in anti-Tata protests

seats.name: Nandigram
seats.note: CM Suvendu Adhikari won from Nandigram

seats.name: Hansan
seats.note: INC win — rare for WB politics
